name: Swirled Pumpkin Cream Cheese Tart
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the crust, combine crumbs, almonds, and sugar in a small bowl. Stir in melted butter until all ingredients are moistened evenly. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate; chill while making the filling.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. To prepare the filling, beat cream cheese and sugar in a large mixing bowl until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Remove half of the batter and stir pumpkin and pumpkin pie spice into the remaining batter. Spoon into the crust. Spoon the reserved batter over the pumpkin batter in the crust; swirl with a spoon. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the outside edge and center comes out clean. Let cool on a wire rack before serving.
